title: The Architect

options.title: Continue/Respond
options.description: [Dialogue-driven options - content varies based on loaded dialogue]

options.title: Proceed
options.description: [Final option] Complete the encounter and win the run

notes:
[purple]Dialogue-Based Event[/purple]

This event features dynamic dialogue with The Architect, a special combat encounter. Key mechanics:

• [gold]Character-Specific Dialogue[/gold]: Different dialogue variations for Ironclad, Silent, Defect, Necrobinder, and Regent
• [gold]Progressive Dialogue[/gold]: Dialogue lines selected based on character visit count and total run wins (SaveManager progress tracking)
• [gold]Interactive Dialogue System[/gold]: Each dialogue line generates a button (Continue/Respond depending on speaker)
• [gold]Combat Interactions[/gold]: Dialogue can trigger attacks from player or Architect at the start or end of the encounter
• [gold]Run Completion[/gold]: Choosing to Proceed after dialogue completes the run with a victory

[red]NOTE[/red]: Full dialogue content and actual option descriptions cannot be extracted - localization data file is empty. The event's complete text and branches depend on loaded dialogue from the localization system.
